Global Context-Aware Feature Learning for Person Reidentification.

This repository contains the code for the paper:.

IAUnet: Global Context-Aware Feature Learning for Person Re-Identification.

Person re-identification (reID) by CNNs based networks has achieved favorable performance in recent years.
